description: Style NoteOmnia Green Jade from bulgari is inspired by the shimmering jade stone, associating the colour green's natural energy and vitality with jade's eternal values of beauty and refinement. With notes of spring water, green mandarin and white peony, nasturtium, pear-tree flower and jasmine petals at the heart and fresh pistachio and white wood musk as the base notes, this truly feminine perfume is a crisp floral fragrance evoking the energy and sensuality of an early morning in Spring.Quantity: 65 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
